chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4145 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.22948/2025 2. For hearing of main case 13.11.2025 Petitioner No.2, Ms. Saima Naz Zaidi, in person --------- This is an old petition of 2019 which has not been pursued for the last six years. Today, petitioner No.2 has finally put in appearance. The main grievance of the petitioner No.2 pertains to supply of water to the residents of House No.K-93, Street No.3, Firdouse Colony, Gulbahar, Karachi. Petitioner No.2 had filed an application for supplying of water dated 17.06.2019 to the Executive Engineer, KW&SB, Liaquatabad Town, Karachi. This application was neither followed up nor responded to over six years. Be that as it may, Managing Director, KW&SB, is directed to decide the aforesaid application of the petitioner within three months of the date of this order through a speaking order. A copy of this order alongwith application dated 17.06.2019 shall be sent to the Managing Director, KW&SB, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
